# VoteGenerator
> Free online poll and survey maker. Create polls and surveys in under 60 seconds with no signup required. 8 poll types. Free forever with up to 100 responses per poll.

## What VoteGenerator Is
VoteGenerator is a free, no-signup poll and survey creation tool. Users create a poll, get a shareable link, and collect responses in real time. No account is required from the poll creator or voters.

## Poll Types Supported
- Multiple Choice (single or multi-select)
- Ranked Choice Voting (drag to rank, instant-runoff calculation)
- Rating Scale (1-5 stars, hearts, or emoji)
- Image Polls (visual side-by-side voting)
- Meeting Scheduler (availability across time slots)
- RSVP Poll (yes/no/maybe attendance tracking)
- This or That (binary comparison)
- Multi-Question Survey (combine question types in one form)

## Key Features
- No signup required from poll creators or voters
- Real-time results dashboard
- Anonymous voting by default
- QR code sharing
- Embed on any website
- CSV export (paid plans)
- 70+ survey templates across 13 categories
- Vote protection (cookies, PIN codes, unique access codes)

## Pricing
- Free: 3 active polls, 100 responses per poll, all 8 poll types, no signup
- Pro: $19/month — 10,000 responses, unlimited polls, CSV export, 1-year duration
- Business: $49/month — 100,000 responses, custom branding, white-label, unique access codes

## Survey Templates
VoteGenerator offers 70+ pre-built survey templates across these categories:
- HR & Culture (employee engagement, exit interviews, pulse surveys, DEI, wellbeing)
- Customer Feedback (CSAT, NPS, restaurant, retail, churn surveys)
- Education (course evaluation, student satisfaction, parent surveys)
- Events (conference feedback, speaker evaluation, meeting feedback)
- Product & Tech (product feedback, PMF survey, app usability, website feedback)
- Healthcare (patient satisfaction, dental, discharge surveys)
- Hospitality (hotel guest satisfaction)
- Property (tenant satisfaction, vacation rental, HOA)
- Marketing (brand awareness)
- Membership (membership satisfaction, podcast content)
- Procurement (vendor evaluation)
- Community (volunteer feedback, nonprofit impact)
- Civic (museum visitor surveys)

## How VoteGenerator Compares to Alternatives
- vs SurveyMonkey: VoteGenerator is free with no response caps on the free tier per poll. SurveyMonkey caps free responses at 25 per survey.
- vs Google Forms: VoteGenerator has real-time visual results, ranked choice voting, and meeting polls. Google Forms has no ranked choice or meeting scheduler.
- vs Typeform: VoteGenerator is free without signup. Typeform requires an account and caps free responses.
- vs StrawPoll: VoteGenerator has 8 poll types including surveys and meeting schedulers. StrawPoll is multiple choice only.
- vs Mentimeter: VoteGenerator is free for async polls. Mentimeter is primarily for live presentation audiences.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://votegenerator.com
- Create a poll: https://votegenerator.com/create
- Create a survey: https://votegenerator.com/survey
- All templates: https://votegenerator.com/templates/
- Pricing: https://votegenerator.com/pricing
- Blog: https://votegenerator.com/blog

## Best Used For
- Quick team decisions (lunch, meeting times, feature prioritization)
- Employee surveys (engagement, satisfaction, pulse checks)
- Customer feedback (CSAT, NPS, post-purchase)
- Event feedback (conference, speaker, meeting evaluation)
- Educational feedback (course evaluation, student satisfaction)
- Social media polls (This or That, audience engagement)
- Event planning (RSVP tracking, scheduling)
